name: sequent
description: Sequent — Comic reader with CBR, CBZ, and PDF support

scripts.predev: rm -rf backend/.nitro backend/.output frontend/.nuxt frontend/.output data/cache/*/ 2>/dev/null; true
scripts.dev: pnpm predev && pnpm install && pnpm run --parallel dev:backend dev:frontend
scripts.build: pnpm predev && pnpm build:backend && pnpm build:frontend
